titleStmt.title: SII 24.226: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 226. (A.R. No. 19 of 1936-37.) IV PRĀKĀRA, NORTH WALL, OPPOSITE TO THE SVARGA-VĀŚAL.

summary.p: Registers a tax-free gift of 106 mā of land by the king in Kōdaṇḍarāma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to the deity named Kōdaṇḍarāma-perumāḷ after the king, and the bhaṭṭas of the colony (vide No. 223). The record is dated in the 12th year and 102nd day of the king's reign and is engraved in continution of No. 223. God Kōdaṇḍarāma-perumāḷ is perhaps identical with god Lakshmīnārāyaṇa-perumāḷ of No. 223. Neṭṭūr-Uḍaiyaṉ Kāliṅgarāyaṉ figures as a signatory in this and two following numbers. The date of the record will be A.D. 1314 in the reign of Sundara-Pāṇḍya III.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvaṉaccakravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ teṉkarai pāṇṭi
kulapati vaḷanāṭṭu viḷā nāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkan tiruppatiyil nām nam perāl vaitta Akaram kotaṇṭarāmaccaturvedimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷukkum Ivvakarattu nāya nār kotaṇṭarāmap perumāḷukkum Alakaṟai nāṭṭup pala kaṭṭaḷaikaḷilum taṇṭu yiṟaiyili Aṭaippu Iṟaiyiliyāy pattāvatu mutal tiṟantu palarkkum jivitamāka vaitta kār maṟunilam Aimpattu muṉṟumāvum Ikkaṭṭaḷaikaḷil taricu pāḻāṉa nilattil tiruttik koḷḷa Aṭaitta nilam Aimpattu muṉṟumāvum Āka nilam nūṟṟu Āṟumā Innilam nūṟṟu Āṟu māvum Uḻavu kuṭimakkaḷukku kuṭi Iruppu nattamāka tanta
ciṟṟūrum Ivvūr Erikkuḷamum Araṅkūrum pūṉainattamum mahentiramaṅkalattukku vaṭakkil Iluppaik kuḷamum Alakaṟai Ūrukku terkku ceṇṭu veḷikkuḷamum Ivvūrkaḷukku Ellaiyāṉa puñcekaḷum Āka Ivai pūtāṉa Iṟaiyili Ākavum Ivvūrkaḷil nāyaṉmār tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam bhaṭṭavṛtti paḷḷic cantam Aiyyaṉ tukkai pātti piṭāri viḷākam Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivaiyum Āka Ivai karadāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākavum tantom . Innilaṅkaḷ kārum maṟuvum Oru pūvum kaṭaip pūvum vampum puṉpayirum kamuku koḻuntu vāḻai mañcaḷiñci karumpu ceṅkaḻuniruḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum payirc ceytu koḷḷavum Ivaiyiṟṟāl
varum kaṭamai Antarāyam kāriya Ārāṭci nelvari poṉvari kācu kaṭamai māvaṭai puṉpayir kaṭamai taṟiiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārp pāṭṭam mauṉam pāṭ ṭam pācip pāṭṭam Oḻukku nirp pāṭṭam Iṭaivari yiṉavari kāṇikkai kāttikaip paccai pañcupili Olai Eḻuttu viniyokam vācalp peṟu Ilāñciṉaip peṟu Āḷt tāḻvu taccut tāḻvu veṭṭi nirāṇi Uṟai nāḻi kāverik karai Āṉaic cālai kutiraip panti toloṭṭup paṭṭaṭaiyum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷum Iṉṉāḷ mutal variyilār kaṇakkilum kaḻittu muṉṉuṭaiyārum paḻam perum mutalil tavirttu mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyi
liyākat tantom Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭāka koṇṭu candrādityavarai cel lak kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koṇṭu Anupavittuk potuka § nilam nūṟ ṟāṟu māvukkum Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu paṉṉiraṇṭu nāḷ nūṟṟiraṇṭu § Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu § tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 24.226 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
